name: — \\ Mountain // — — \\Arknights// —
description:
Please read what will be at the very bottom!!!

"Warm-up is over!

" You can try, but you won't take s single step forward.

"Mountain, motionless, like his name.

__________________________________________

Guys, forgive me for possible spelling mistakes, English is not my native language!! This is one of my first bots, so please leave a comment if you liked it or have any ideas or requests!!!

Also, guys, I do not know what to write here, because this is my first bot. I also noticed that in many other bots, the color of his eyes was confused with the typical tiger color - amber or gold, so I'll try to make him blue-eyed here!!

(To change the POV, just go to the chat memory and hiss in the line He/his/him or she/her!!)

(Have a nice chat :))

((P. S.!! — Let me know right away if you want more bots with this wonderful tiger or any other characters!!))
creator: Your. Knight
